name: bpmct
html: bpmct
css: .stage{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;height:100%;gap:2px;background:#0a0a0a;overflow:hidden}.letter{font-size:3.8rem;font-weight:900;display:inline-block;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:-2px;line-height:1;animation:bounce 0.6s ease-in-out infinite alternate}.l1{color:#ff3cac;animation-delay:0s;animation-name:bounce,spin1}.l2{color:#ffdd00;animation-delay:0.1s;animation-name:bounce}.l3{color:#00f5d4;animation-delay:0.2s;animation-name:bounce,wobble}.l4{color:#ff6b35;animation-delay:0.3s;animation-name:bounce}.l5{color:#c77dff;animation-delay:0.4s;animation-name:bounce,skew1}@keyframes bounce{0%{transform:translateY(0) scale(1)}100%{transform:translateY(-28px) scale(1.25)}}@keyframes wobble{0%{transform:translateY(0) rotate(-15deg) scale(1)}100%{transform:translateY(-28px) rotate(15deg) scale(1.3)}}@keyframes spin1{0%{transform:translateY(0) rotateY(0deg) scale(1)}100%{transform:translateY(-28px) rotateY(180deg) scale(1.25)}}@keyframes skew1{0%{transform:translateY(0) skewX(0deg) scale(1)}100%{transform:translateY(-28px) skewX(-20deg) scale(1.25)}}
